Migration.RefreshNotice: Hero Mancer 2 cleaned up settings left over from a previous version. Please refresh your browser (F5) for all changes to take effect.

Compare.Empty: No pins yet. Use the pin button on a card to add it here.
Compare.NeedTwo: Pin at least two options to compare them.

Banner.DupEdition: Same feat name across editions - compare the rows below.

LevelUp.NotCharacter: Hero Mancer 2 level-up only supports character actors.
LevelUp.Failed: Level up failed. Your character was restored to its previous state.
LevelUp.Heading: Level up: {name}

Prereq.FailTooltip: You have not met the multiclassing requirement for this class. Confirm with your GM before choosing.

SheetButton.Tooltip: Open Hero Mancer 2 in level-up mode for this character.
SheetButton.SendTooltip: Notify the player to level up this character.
SheetButton.SendGroupTooltip: Notify selected party members to level up.

Dialog.GrantBody: Grant a level-up to {actor}? They will see a pulsing Level Up button on their character sheet.
Dialog.GrantGroupBody: Select party members to grant a level-up:

Broadcast.Grant: {gm} granted {actor} a level-up. Open your sheet to begin.

Preview.ASINote: Choose +2 / +1/+1 spread or a feat in the Advancements tab.
Preview.SubclassNote: Pick a subclass below before advancing.

Source.SameTooltip: These classes match the ruleset of your existing class.
Source.CrossTooltip: These classes use a different ruleset than your existing class.

Impact.Title: Multiclass impact
Impact.SpellStack: Your caster level rises from {old} to {new}. Slots stack across all leveled-caster classes on the multiclass table.
Impact.SpellNew: This class introduces leveled spell slots.
Impact.ASINote: First ASI from this class lands at character level {charLevel} (class level {classLevel}).

Queue.Title: Pending Approvals
Queue.RestoredToast: Submission restored to the pending queue.

ClearArchive.Title: Clear approval archive?
ClearArchive.Body: Delete all archived submissions? This cannot be undone.

RejectionNotice.Title: Submission Rejected
RejectionNotice.Body: Your GM rejected your character submission. Restore it to edit and resubmit, or start over.

SubmissionLock.Banner: Your character is awaiting GM review. The form is read-only until the GM approves or rejects.

Replay.Created: Your GM approved {name}. The sheet is now open.
Replay.GMEdited: Your GM approved {name} (with edits). The character has been created.
Replay.Failed: Approval received, but character creation failed. Check the console for details.

RejectDialog.Title: Reject Submission
RejectDialog.Prompt: Optionally explain why. The submitter will see this when they receive the rejection.

Dnd5e.ConsentBody: Hero Mancer 2 needs advancement automation enabled to apply features correctly. Your current setting has it disabled.

SpellBook.Missing: Install the Spell Book module to manage spells for this character.
SpellBook.NoGM: No GM is online to finalize your spellbook. Your character is created; ask your GM to configure spells when they're back.
SpellBook.Canceled: Your GM closed the spellbook setup without saving. You can request it again from your character sheet.

NoCompendiums.gm: Spell Book has no enabled spell compendiums. Open the dnd5e source configuration and enable at least one Item compendium that contains spells.
NoCompendiums.player: Your GM hasn't finished setting up Spell Book yet. Your spells will be available once they enable a spell compendium.

Waiting.Title: Finalizing spellbook...
Waiting.Body: Waiting for your GM to configure spellcasting rules for {name}. The Spell Book will open here as soon as they save.

Description.Hint: A summary of the abilities, feat, proficiencies, and gold is added automatically.

Multiclass.PrimaryTooltip: Primary class -- grants starting equipment and level-1 max HP
Multiclass.AddMissing: Class pick missing on a multiclass row
Multiclass.BalanceMismatch: Multiclass level totals don't match the starting level
Multiclass.BalanceOver: Over by {over} ({total} / {max}) -- reduce a class level
Multiclass.PrereqFailed: Multiclass prereq not met for a picked class

OpenForPlayer.NotGM: Only a GM can open Hero Mancer 2 for another player.
OpenForPlayer.UnknownUser: That player could not be found.
OpenForPlayer.Offline: {name} is not connected. They need to be online to open Hero Mancer 2.
OpenForPlayer.Failed: Could not open Hero Mancer 2 for {name}.

Randomize.Failed: Randomize could not finish. Some selections may be incomplete.
Randomize.ConfirmBody:
Randomizes: name, identity, ability scores, and hit points.
Not touched: Equipment, Biography, and Advancements.

Welcome.Title: Welcome to Hero Mancer 2
Welcome.Lede: A guided character creator and level-up tool.

GM.Heading: For GMs
GM.StepSources: Configure Sources in the Compendium Browser. Hero Mancer 2 respects which compendiums you choose to pull from.
GM.StepSettings: Tune Hero Mancer 2 from Abilities, Wizard Flow, Enforcement, Player Experience, or Compendium Exclusion List.
GM.StepApprovals: When players submit characters, a banner appears at the top of your screen. If you dismiss the notification, you can access the Queue from the Queue Manager in the settings menu.
GM.StepOnBehalf: GMs can create or level-up characters on behalf of players by selecting them from the Player dropdown on the Start tab.
GM.StepLevelUp: Grant a level-up by pressing Send Level Up on the group sheet header. A glowing Level Up button appears on the player's sheet near the rest buttons.

Player.Heading: Getting started
Player.StepLaunch: Open Hero Mancer 2 from the Actor Directory header or by choosing Create with Hero Mancer 2 in the Create Actor dialog.
Player.StepTabs: Take care to fill out all the information you can on each tab (and sub-tab!) before finalizing your character.
Player.StepSubmit: Press Build Character to submit. If your GM requires approval, the wizard locks until they review your submission; a banner shows the reason if it was rejected.
Player.StepLevelUp: When your GM grants a level-up, a glowing Level Up button appears on your sheet near your rest buttons. Click it to start.

Validation.PointBuy: Point buy budget not fully spent
Validation.StandardArray: Assign every standard-array value to an ability
Validation.ManualEntry: Enter a value within range for every ability

ConfirmIncomplete.Title: Create anyway?
ConfirmIncomplete.Body: Some required choices are still incomplete:
ConfirmIncomplete.Warning: Creating now may leave advancements unset or applied incorrectly.

Finalize.NoProficiencies: Pick a species, class, and background to populate proficiencies.

SpellHandoff.SkipLabel: Don't open Spell Book after character creation
SpellHandoff.SkipHint: Skip the automatic spell-setup flow. You can open Spell Book yourself from the character sheet whenever you're ready.

Biography.TraitsPlaceholder: e.g. I quote scripture for every occasion.
Biography.BondsPlaceholder: e.g. My mentor went missing - I will find them.
Biography.FlawsPlaceholder: e.g. I cannot resist a wager, no matter the stakes.
Biography.AppearancePlaceholder: e.g. Tall and wiry, with a faded crimson cloak.

Hints.Backstory: Where you came from, what shaped you, why you walk this road.

Blurbs.str: How hard you swing a sword and how much you can carry. Skills: Athletics.
Blurbs.dex: Reflexes, balance, and the kind of grace that turns a fall into a tumble. Skills: Acrobatics, Sleight of Hand, Stealth.
Blurbs.con: Toughness and stamina, or how much punishment you can soak before going down.
Blurbs.int: Raw reasoning, memory, and 'I read that in a book once.' Skills: Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, Religion.
Blurbs.wis: Perceptiveness, gut instinct, and willpower. Skills: Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Perception, Survival.
Blurbs.cha: Confidence, poise, and personal magnetism. Skills: Deception, Intimidation, Performance, Persuasion.
Blurbs.hon: Personal honor and standing in society.
Blurbs.san: Mental fortitude against horror, madness, and reality unraveling.

Abilities.RerollNoUnassigned: All pool values are assigned to abilities. Unassign one from its dropdown before rerolling.

Equipment.EmptyPickClassBg: Pick a class and background to see starting-equipment choices.
Equipment.NoChoices: No equipment choices for this combination.
Equipment.WealthActiveNote: Equipment skipped - remaining gold will be added to sheet.

Shop.EmptyNoWealth: Enable a wealth toggle in Granted Equipment to unlock starting gold for purchases.
Shop.CartEmpty: Cart empty. Click a tile to add it.

Start.LevelTileHint: Campaign default set by the GM.

Hints.Name: Type a name, or click shuffle to roll one. Middle dropdown picks style (feminine / masculine / surname). Right dropdown picks cultural flavor (Elven, Dwarven, etc).
Hints.Birthday: Picks the character's birthday. A recurring note is added to your calendar on creation.
Hints.PlayerAssignment: Hand the finished character to a player. They become the owner; you stay GM.
Hints.Level: The level your character starts at. Above level 1 unlocks multiclass + advancement choices.
Hints.LevelLocked: Locked to the campaign default. Ask your GM to adjust the starting level setting.
Hints.CharacterArt: Path to the portrait shown on the sheet, in the wizard HUD, and in chat cards.
Hints.TokenArt: Path to the image shown on the canvas. Auto-mirrors the portrait when linked.
Hints.ArtNoPermission: You don't have file-browsing permission, so art can't be picked here. Your GM can set art after creation or grant the File Browsing permission.
Hints.LinkTokenArt: Use the character portrait for the token too — skips a separate token image.
Hints.PlayerColor: Tint for chat bubbles, cursor, and ownership indicators across the table.
Hints.PlayerPronouns: Optional display pronouns; shows next to your name in the Players list (bottom-left).
Hints.DiceAppearance: Open Dice So Nice's editor to pick this character's dice colorset. Saves on close.
Hints.RingEnabled: Turn on the dynamic token ring for this character. Required for the ring/background colors below to show.
Hints.RingColor: Color of the outer dynamic ring around the token.
Hints.BackgroundColor: Color of the inner ring frame behind the portrait.

Advancements.Empty: Pick your Identity before setting advancements.
Advancements.None: This class has no advancements at the chosen level.
Advancements.BrowseMax: You have already selected the maximum number of items for this choice.
Advancements.NoOptions: No valid options - this advancement is misconfigured. Skipped.
Advancements.FeatGrantFailed: Could not add the chosen feat: {uuid} did not resolve to an item. It may be from a compendium that is not installed.

FeatBrowser.Empty: No feats indexed. Configure feat compendiums in dnd5e source settings.
FeatBrowser.EmptyFilter: No feats match the current filters.
FeatBrowser.QualifyingOnly: Show only feats you qualify for

HP.empty: Pick a class on the Identity tab to set up hit points.
HP.applied-tooltip: This level's hit points were already applied to this character.

CloseConfirm.Title: Unsaved Changes
CloseConfirm.Content: You have unsaved changes. Save a draft to resume later, discard them, or cancel and stay in the wizard.

ShowWelcome.Name: Show Welcome
ShowWelcome.Hint: Show the Hero Mancer 2 welcome dialog once per session.

DisableWelcomePopup.Name: Disable Welcome Popup
DisableWelcomePopup.Hint: Globally suppress the welcome dialog for every user in this world. Overrides each player's Show Welcome setting.

MulticlassThreshold.Name: Multiclass ability threshold
MulticlassThreshold.Hint: Minimum ability score required to multiclass into a class. Standard is 13.

DisableMulticlass.Name: Disable Multiclassing
DisableMulticlass.Hint: Prevent players from adding a second class during character creation or level-up.

Logger.Name: Logging Level
Logger.Hint: How much Hero Mancer 2 logs to the browser console.

PublishWealthRolls.Name: Publish Starting Wealth Rolls
PublishWealthRolls.Hint: When enabled, starting wealth rolls will be published to chat for all users.

PublishHpRolls.Name: Publish HP Rolls
PublishHpRolls.Hint: When enabled, manual hit point rolls will be published to chat for all users.

PublishCreationSummary.Name: Publish Creation Summary
PublishCreationSummary.Hint: Post a chat card summarizing the new character.

PublishLevelUpBroadcast.Name: Publish Level-Up Summary
PublishLevelUpBroadcast.Hint: Post a chat message when a level-up is completed.

KeepApprovalArchive.Name: Archive Submissions
KeepApprovalArchive.Hint: Keep approved and rejected submissions in a journal instead of deleting them on resolve.

RequireApprovalForPlayers.Name: Require GM Approval
RequireApprovalForPlayers.Hint: Player characters are queued for GM review instead of being created directly. GMs bypass this.

EnforceBiography.Name: Require Biography Fields
EnforceBiography.Hint: When enabled, every field on the Biography tab must be filled before a character can be submitted.

EnforceArt.Name: Require Character Art
EnforceArt.Hint: When enabled, character art is required. Token art is also required unless 'use character art for token' is checked.

PendingApprovalsMenu.Name: Pending Approvals Queue
PendingApprovalsMenu.Hint: Open the GM-side queue browser to review pending character submissions.
PendingApprovalsMenu.Label: Open Queue

Troubleshooter.Title: Troubleshooter
Troubleshooter.Notes: Copy or download this report and attach it to your bug report on Discord or GitHub.

Menu.Name: Troubleshooter
Menu.Hint: Generate a diagnostic report for bug reports.
Menu.Label: Open Troubleshooter

AllowedMethods.Name: Allowed Rolling Methods
AllowedMethods.Hint: Which rolling methods you allow your players to use to generate ability scores.

AllowedHPMethods.Name: Allowed Hit Point Methods
AllowedHPMethods.Hint: Which hit point methods you allow your players to use to roll health.

Menu.Name: Hero Mancer 2 Settings
Menu.Hint: Open the Hero Mancer 2 settings dashboard. Groups every world + client setting under a tabbed UI.
Menu.Label: Open Settings

LockIdentityRuleset.Name: Lock identity decisions to ruleset
LockIdentityRuleset.Hint: When on, your first identity pick locks every other identity choice to its ruleset (2014 or 2024). Options with no ruleset stay available to all.

HideOtherCreateActorOptions.Name: Hide Other Create Options
HideOtherCreateActorOptions.Hint: Players see only the Hero Mancer 2 button in the Create Actor dialog. GMs see all options.

TrimSourceParenthetical.Name: Trim Sourcebook Suffix
TrimSourceParenthetical.Hint: Hide the sourcebook tag in option names, e.g. 'Tiefling (PHB)' becomes 'Tiefling'.

ArtPickerRoot.Name: Art Directory
ArtPickerRoot.Hint: Starting folder for the character art picker.

PlayerCustomization.Name: Allow Player Customization
PlayerCustomization.Hint: Let players pick their player color and pronouns during character creation.

TokenCustomization.Name: Allow Token Ring Customization
TokenCustomization.Hint: Let players enable the dynamic token ring and pick its ring + background color.

Randomize.Name: Enable Randomizer?
Randomize.Hint: Allows users to randomize aspects of their character creation process.

AdvancementOrder.Name: Identity Order
AdvancementOrder.Hint: Set the order the Background, Species, and Class tabs appear in the creation wizard.

CustomRollFormula.Name: Manual Roll Formula
CustomRollFormula.Hint: The dice formula used by the Manual roll method. Default is 4d6kh3.

CustomPointBuyTotal.Name: Point Buy Amount
CustomPointBuyTotal.Hint: Total points each player has to spend in point buy. Default is 27.

PointBuyCostMap.Name: Cost Table
PointBuyCostMap.Hint: The point cost of each ability score. Edit, add, or remove rows.

CustomFocusItems.Name: Custom Spellcasting Focus
CustomFocusItems.Hint: Items treated as valid spellcasting focuses, merged into the system list and available in the equipment shop.

AllowRerolls.Name: Allow Rerolls
AllowRerolls.Hint: Let players reroll manually rolled values, like HP and abilities.

MaxRerollAttempts.Name: Max Reroll Attempts
MaxRerollAttempts.Hint: How many times a player can reroll. Set to 0 for unlimited.

StandardArrayValues.Name: Standard Array Formula
StandardArrayValues.Hint: Comma separated scores your players must choose from.

Disable.Name: Disable Custom Backgrounds
Disable.Hint: Remove the custom-background builder option from the background picker. Players can only choose an existing background.

AbilityChoices.Name: Ability Choices
AbilityChoices.Hint: How many ability scores a player selects when building a custom background.

AbilityPoints.Name: Ability Points
AbilityPoints.Hint: Total ability-score points distributed across the chosen abilities.

AbilityCap.Name: Ability Cap
AbilityCap.Hint: Maximum points that may be placed in a single ability.

SkillCount.Name: Skill Proficiencies
SkillCount.Hint: How many skill proficiencies a custom background grants.

ToolCount.Name: Tool Proficiencies
ToolCount.Hint: How many tool proficiencies a custom background grants.

FeatCount.Name: Origin Feats
FeatCount.Hint: How many origin feats a custom background grants.

Budget.Name: Starting Gold
Budget.Hint: Gold pieces a custom background grants.

Default.Name: Default Ability Score
Default.Hint: The starting value for ability scores when creating a new character.

Min.Name: Minimum Ability Score
Min.Hint: The lowest value allowed for ability scores during character creation.

Max.Hint: The highest value allowed for ability scores during character creation.

StartingLevel.Name: Starting Level
StartingLevel.Hint: Level new characters start at. Default is 1.

AllowPlayerLevelOverride.Name: Allow Player Level Override
AllowPlayerLevelOverride.Hint: When enabled, players can change their starting level on the Start tab. When disabled, the campaign default is enforced.

HPRerollOnes.Name: Reroll 1s on Hit Dice
HPRerollOnes.Hint: When enabled, manual HP rolls reroll any 1 on the first try (uses 1dNrr1).

HPL1MaxDie.Name: Level 1 Uses Max Hit Die
HPL1MaxDie.Hint: The primary class gets maximum HP at first level.

RefundUnchosenGold.Name: Refund Skipped Equipment
RefundUnchosenGold.Hint: Unchecking a granted equipment item adds its price to your shop gold.

BonusGoldFormula.Name: Bonus Starting Gold Formula
BonusGoldFormula.Hint: Roll formula or fixed amount (e.g. '1d100*3' or '250') added to every character's starting gold pool. Leave blank to disable. Dice formulas require a player roll on the Granted Equipment tab; fixed amounts apply automatically.

ShopIncludeMagicItems.Name: Sell Magic Items
ShopIncludeMagicItems.Hint: Add magic items to the equipment shop, bought from the same gold pool as ordinary gear. Useful for characters starting above level 1.

ShopMaxMagicRarity.Name: Maximum Magic Item Rarity
ShopMaxMagicRarity.Hint: Highest rarity of magic item offered in the shop when magic items are enabled.

Dicesonice.Name: Enable 3D Dice for Ability Rolls
Dicesonice.Hint: Show 3D dice animations for ability score rolls using Dice So Nice.

Tokenizer.Name: Tokenizer Compatibility
Tokenizer.Hint: Use Tokenizer 2's editor for character portrait and token art.
